use_cases: Displaying incident severity distribution (Critical, High, Medium) over a 7-day period
Visualizing categorized time-series data with stacked areas for comparative analysis
Tracking multiple related metrics that build upon each other in a single view
Dashboard analytics for monitoring trends across different categories
Reporting and data analysis in business intelligence applications
ai_summary: A stacked area chart component from the reaviz library that visualizes categorical time-series data with multiple stacked areas. Displays data across 7 days with three severity categories (Critical, High, Medium) using a pink color scheme, featuring linear axes with tick labels and gridlines. Designed for dashboards and analytics in SaaS, fintech, and healthcare applications where comparative trend analysis is needed.
